Orbis Terrarum.name: Orbis Terrarum
Orbis Terrarum.basicInfo: The Known World stretches beneath the iron gaze of the eternal Emperor Tiberius Corvus, whose dynasty has held the Aquilan Imperium in unbroken succession for generations untold. From the marble spires of the Capitol to the windswept garrisons of the bleeding northern frontier, six elemental furies shape all things—Terra anchors the earth, Ventus commands the gales, Ignis sets flame to war and hearth, Aqua sustains and drowns, Ferrum forges steel and bone, and Silva whispers through leaf and root. The Twelve High Houses wield these furies as their birthright, their power absolute and terrible. Yet the empire's grandeur masks deeper cracks: the barbarian hordes gather beyond the Mautvian Reaches, their shamanic fury still untamed; the contested eastern war-coast erupts in philosopher-cities and blood-soaked harbors, its allegiance forever uncertain; across the Mare Internum, the rival sea-empire of Tharsis—steeped in blood-priesthood and forbidden sorcery—watches with hunger in its ancient eyes. And far beneath the soil, in the forgotten depths where no furycrafter dares venture, something vast and terrible stirs in its endless sleep, indifferent to the games of emperors and houses alike.
